name: Wild Rabbit Gumbo with Oysters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a black iron pot, make a roux by combining oil and flour. Cook slowly over low heat until dark brown, stirring occasionally.
2. Add onions, bell pepper, and celery to the pot. Cook until wilted.
3. Stir in seasonings, 3 quarts of hot water, and seasoned rabbit. Cover and cook over low heat for 2 hours or until the rabbit is very tender.
4. Add oysters, shallots, and parsley. Simmer slowly until the edges of the oysters begin to curl.
5. Serve over rice with file and french bread.
